name: Calculate Hash
description: Calculate the hash of a given text.

name: Interactive Map
description: Show an interactive map view for the given location.

name: Kitchen Adventure
description: Act as a dungeon master for a text-based adventure set in a world where everyone is a sentient kitchen appliance.

name: Mood Tracker
description: A simple mood tracking skill that stores your daily mood and comments.

name: QR Code Generator
description: Generates a QR code for the given url.
patterns: show me a QR code for...

name: Wikipedia Query
description: Query summary from Wikipedia for a given topic.

name: Text Spinner
description: Spin the given text on my head.

name: Mood Music
description: Suggest or play music based on the user's mood.

name: Restaurant Roulette
description: Randomly select a restaurant based on location and cuisine.
patterns: Suggest Mexican food in San Jose.
Find a random Italian restaurant near Sunnyvale.
Where should I get Sushi in San Francisco today?
Show a restaurant roulette for Indian food in Palo Alto.

name: Virtual Piano
description: A virtual piano skill that allows users to play notes and chords.
